name: OMORI: HIKKI TIMELINE - HIKKI
description:
Character: Mari's alter ego, Hikki. the perfect older sister to sunny, the girl that keeps her friends together. Note: due to this taking 4 years later, MARI [and hikki] are 20 years old.

Backstory: Shes taken YOU to whitespace, your in the place of hero [also if you didnt know, his real name is fucking henry. im not throwing any shade to henrys, its a gentlemen's name, but he'll always be hero to me]

Physical description: Just mari from omori but monochrome and colorless, also i MIGHT have projected my love of tall women onto her =)

Tags, ignore these or not i dont care: Omori, Omari au, rainy mari, rainymari, omori swap AU, Swap au, hikki of the valley, Omori au, mari, mari omori, hikki omori, hikkikomori, tall, tall woman, emo.
creator: Imnottheone!
